hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Memo Day, Hairspray is a fun choice because it's all about self-expression through dance and music, just like how writing down your memos can be a fun way to express yourself.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is an energetic and entertaining film with great music and impressive dance numbers. The cast delivers outstanding performances that will keep you smiling throughout the movie.

released.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End is an epic conclusion to the original trilogy, bringing together the beloved characters for an unforgettable adventure.
released.blurb: The film features stunning visuals, impressive action sequences, and a talented cast. The movie's intricate plot and memorable characters make it a must-watch for fans of the franchise.

birthday.title: Mr. Holland's Opus
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Richard Dreyfuss, Mr. Holland's Opus is a heartwarming film that showcases his incredible talent as a dedicated teacher who inspires his students through music.
birthday.blurb: The movie features outstanding performances, a beautiful soundtrack, and a poignant story that will leave you feeling inspired. Richard Dreyfuss delivers a powerful and emotional performance as the titular character.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: a famously bad movie with terrible reviews, I Know Who Killed Me is a cringe-worthy thriller that fails to deliver on its promising premise.
awful.blurb: The film's convoluted plot, poor acting, and lack of suspense make it a laughable attempt at a psychological thriller. The movie's attempts at being clever and twisty only result in a confusing and boring experience.
